title: February 7th, 2020 (2)
body:

        - the bible isn’t but the angle is different
        - clutter, clutter
        - clutter clutter what a pain
        - i'm trying to touch on everything
        - that's way too much
        - that's way too much
        - yeah i know but what i'm sayin

        - it weighs too much
        - quit trying to carry all the pain
        - it pays to put it down and rest
        - and pray for clarity and trust
        - it will save us
        - a lotta stress, we gotta bless

        - even if we atheist

        - fuck this i'm god
        - holy ghoster, roller coaster

        - stir the pot when i serve the rock
        - when i'm on point i can't be stopped
        - i dunno if you heard or not
        - they want the d, they need the d
        - when i give it to em, i'm mvp
        - when i hold back, i’m interesting
        - bojack
        - bring that shit back
        - swing like bo jack
        - hoarse like bojack
        - ride it cuz i know that
        - i'm that shakespeare
        - can't wait for next year

        - last year was a great year
        - no room for fakes here

        - accents, hair color
        - eye color, how ta rap
        - i could allow that
        - i could be proud that
        - i could be found at
        - the top of the mountain
        - cuz i found the fountain
        - of youth and i'm countin
        - on you to keep comin up
        - with new ways of soundin
        - i'm cool with what's hot
        - i do with what i got
        - knew way back
        - i could do it to the top
        - who would make me stop
        - as far as they concerned
        - i'm dude that make it pop
        - an i make them dudes a lot
        - it's a business, you're a product
        - i'm a product of the business
        - if you could live with it
        - then pursue it for a livin
        - always thought i was gifted
        - ain't get it til i got it
        - it ain't about talent
        - when you sellin narcotic
        - it's about tellin em
        - where you at when you got it
        - it's about understanding
        - just how bad they want it
        - fish em with the hook
        - don't care if they too small
        - reel talk we gone eat em all
        - really think i could beat em all
        - took stock, i'm a be the mall
        - took off, can't wait
        - to see where i'm a be tomorrow
        - an what kind a beat i'm on
        - bring that shit back
        - swing like bo jack
        - hoarse like bojack
        - ride it cuz i know that
        - bring that shit back
        - swing like bo jack
        - hoarse like bojack
        - ride it cuz i know that
        - drop step (i got that)
        - i don’t drop songs, i drop verses
        - never had a drop top, i drive versas
        - gotta decent drop step, i drive versus
        - anyone with a rep, i drop buckets
        - you wanna step, i’m like fuck it i love it
        - let’s see what the rock do
        - if i did it i done it, when you got it like that
        - can’t nobody stop you
        - shoot ya shot, use the moves you got
        - so nobody block you
        - pullup hesi jimbo real ballers know where i got that
        - drop back, pull up from the corner at half court cuz i got that
        - the feeling saying your alive
        - i’ve been singing saying whispering
        - silent praying crying gibbering
        - just to see if you could hear me
        - i can’t tell
        - so can you tell me if i’m here
        - i can’t hear you very well
        - well i don’t listen all too swell
        - but i can hear the music swell
        - it’s how i know i’m not too lost
        - so please keep singing your own song
        - i’ll find the rhythm fore too long
        - you’re the siren, i’m the building burning down
        - or maybe it’s the other way around
        - it’s hard to tell, it’s always turning
        - every day i’m learning just how dumb and blind i am
        - the smoke gets in your eyes but now and then
        - you find the fire is your friend
        - the warmth your only guide
        - the feeling saying you’re alive
        - matter fact
        - what you call materialism i say mysticism
        - animism
        - this gold that’s the color my soul
        - rims spinning, that’s how i roll
        - rock a diamond piece cuz i’m not whole
        - but i’m shining at least. i’m not coal
        - temple mine
        - my body is a temple so i gilt it with gold
        - catch me writing on the wall i’m tryin ta fill it with soul
        - mother nature built me and i’ve never been sold
        - so when she come collectin bet that i’m a let go
        - and (my daughter’s a giant)
        - i’m a combination of my mother and father
        - and i can’t get much f[[[[[[art]]]]]]her than the planet i’m p[[[[[[art]]]]]] of
        - i’m a combination of a son and a daughter
        - i’m not what you call me, i drink fire and water
        - i’m the culmination of a billion year project
        - so how come my nation fit in a billionaire pocket
        - i’m in competition with the forces of entropy
        - and i’m pretty sure this stray bullet was meant for me
        - i’m a combination of the man and the m[[[[[[art]]]]]]yr
        - hoping you’ll be my product, helping you see what i thought up
        - i’m a combination of a fan and an [[[[[[art]]]]]]ist
        - hoping you see my product, helping you be what you wanted
        - i’m a conversation between private and public
        - we speak three different languages and all profit from it
        - my daughter speaks languages i don’t understand
        - so i try to keep makin noise to show her i can
        - my daughter sees everything when she stares at her hands
        - so i just try to make sure nothing’s snaring her plans
        - my daughter’s a giant, she’ll live longer than me
        - an her roots reach f[[[[[[art]]]]]]her than my whole family tree
        - she been here since the beginning, i just roll it along
        - kinda like there was rhythm fore i wrote her this song
        - kinda like i was kiddin fore she showed up
        - sharing her wisdom, i get to watch her grow up
    - professional
